Privasi Anda adalah prioritas kami. Doku: Your privacy is our priority. This document explains how we collect, use, and protect your information when you use our Office Boy management platform.
Kami mengumpulkan informasi untuk member: We collect information to provide better services to all of our users. This includes:
Informasi Akun: Nama, email dan peran (K: Account Information: Name, email, and role (Employee or Office Boy).
Data Laporan: Deskripsi tugas, foto bukt: Report Data: Task descriptions, work evidence photos, and completion times.
Lokasi: Data lokasi saat melakukan pelap: Location: Location data during reporting to validate task attendance (only if permitted).
Informasi yang kami kumpulkan digunakan: The information we collect is used to operate, maintain, and provide Lapor-OB service features, including:
\"Memantau kinerja operasional harian se: "Monitoring daily operational performance in real time to keep the building clean."
Kami juga menggunakan data untuk mengiri: We also use data to send new task notifications or report status updates directly to your device.
Kami bekerja keras untuk melindungi Lapo: We work hard to protect Lapor-OB and our users from unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction of information we hold.
Anda dapat meminta akses, koreksi, atau: You may request access, correction, or deletion of your personal data at any time by contacting
Data Anda dienkripsi dengan standar indu: Your data is encrypted using industry standards.
Kami tidak pernah menjual data pribadi A: We never sell your personal data to third parties.
Anda memiliki kendali penuh atas informa: You have full control over your profile information.
Silakan baca Syarat & Ketentuan kami ata: Please read our Terms & Conditions or contact the help center for further clarification.
Selamat datang di Lapor-OB. Dengan menga:
Welcome to Lapor-OB. By accessing and using our platform, you agree to be bound by the following Terms and Conditions. This service is provided to support reporting and building facility management.

If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you are advised to stop using our services immediately.
Anda bertanggung jawab menjaga kerahasia: You are responsible for keeping your account password confidential.
Informasi yang diberikan saat pendaftara: Information provided during registration must be accurate and valid.
Satu akun hanya boleh digunakan oleh sat: One account may only be used by one authorized individual.
Lapor-OB digunakan untuk melaporkan kebu: Lapor-OB is used to report cleaning or repair needs in work areas. Users are prohibited from:
Menggunakan bahasa yang kasar atau tidak: Using rude or inappropriate language in descriptions.
Melakukan spamming sistem dengan permint: Spamming the system with repeated requests without reason.
Pengumpulan dan penggunaan data pribadi: The collection and use of your personal data is governed by our Privacy Policy. By agreeing to these Terms & Conditions, you are also considered to have understood the Privacy Policy.
Kami berhak memperbarui Syarat & Ketentu: We reserve the right to update these Terms & Conditions at any time. Changes become effective immediately after being published on this page. Continued use of the service after changes indicates your acceptance.
Tim admin kami siap membantu Anda memaha: Our admin team is ready to help you understand these terms.
